Brand Guidelines · Colour · Logo · Typography

Brand Guidelines
Colour · Logo · Type

Brand Direction: Practical Precision
Typography: Familjen Grotesk · DM Sans · Space Mono
3 Palette Variations
Version 2.0 · 2025
Palette Comparison · 3 Directions

Three palette variations built from the same Amber / Cream / Stone base. The anchor dark shifts the mood: Graphite is warm and earthy, rooted in the geological material palette; Midnight Teal adds atmospheric coolness like deep underground water; True Black delivers raw, industrial contrast. All three keep #E3B23C as the primary accent.

Recommended

Amber Family · Accent & Action
Copy
Amber
#E3B23C
rgb(227, 178, 60)
Primary CTAs on dark. Logo mark on dark surfaces. Active indicators, progress fills, scan beam accents.
Accent / CTA
Copy
Amber Deep
#C89A2A
rgb(200, 154, 42)
Text-safe amber on white. Eyebrow labels, kickers, inline links. Meets WCAG AA on white. Never use #E3B23C for text on white.
Text / Accessible
Copy
Amber Dim
rgba(227,178,60, 0.10)
Badge fills. Hover tints. Active nav item background. Ambient glow in hero and CTA sections.

Amber Mid
rgba(227,178,60, 0.28)
Badge borders. Active card outlines. Focus ring shadows. Scan beam glow filters.
Border / Glow

Logo · Mark Colour Variants

The GroundedAI "G" mark with transparent background shown in 5 colour variants. Amber is the primary logo colour, adapted from #FFB000 to #E3B23C. Additional variants for dark backgrounds (White, Cream) and light backgrounds (Graphite, Amber Deep) ensure legibility across all contexts.

Amber
Primary. On dark surfaces.
#E3B23C
White
Monochrome on dark backgrounds.
#FFFFFF
Cream
Softer alternative on dark surfaces.
#EDEBD7
Graphite
On white / light surfaces.
#1A1A18
Amber Deep
Accessible variant on light.
#C89A2A
Logo Rules · Do's & Don'ts
Do
Minimum Clear Space
Maintain clear space equal to the height of the "G" crossbar on all sides. No text, graphics, or edges should intrude.
Don't
Amber on Amber
Never place the amber logo on amber-tinted or gradient amber backgrounds. This destroys contrast.
Do
Minimum Size: 24px
Never render smaller than 24×24px on screen or 8mm in print. The modular shapes lose definition at small sizes.
Don't
Rotate or Distort
Never rotate, stretch, skew, or add effects. The mark must always appear at 0° rotation.
Logo Colour · Palette Adaptation

The logo transitions from #FFB000 to #E3B23C — a warm gold-amber that preserves the orange identity while gaining richer contrast. The shift is subtle (~12° warmer, slightly desaturated) ensuring brand recognition is maintained.

Copy
Original Logo
#FFB000
rgb(255, 176, 0)
Previous logo colour. Pure amber-orange.
Previous
Copy
New Primary
#E3B23C
rgb(227, 178, 60)
New logo colour. Warm gold-amber. Better contrast on both surfaces.
Active
Copy
Accessible Variant
#C89A2A
rgb(200, 154, 42)
Darker variant for text and low-contrast surfaces. WCAG AA on white.
Text Safe
Typography · 3 Typeface System

Familjen Grotesk for headlines — distinctive geometric warmth. DM Sans for body — excellent readability, pairs naturally. Space Mono for system labels and metadata — technical, engineering-forward.

Display / H1
Familjen Grotesk · 700
−1px tracking
Line-height 0.92
We Make Sense
of the Underground.
Headline / H2
Familjen Grotesk · 700
−0.5px tracking
Line-height 1.0
From Observation
to Action
Subheading / H3
Familjen Grotesk · 600
Normal tracking
Line-height 1.1
One platform connecting field
observations to decisions.
Body
DM Sans · 300–400
Normal tracking
1.65–1.7 line-height
Underground projects depend on assumptions about what the ground will look like and how it will behave. When those assumptions are wrong, teams face delays, safety risks, disputes, and cost overruns. GroundedAI exists to close that gap.
System / Labels
Space Mono · 400
All-caps · +2–3px
9–10px size
Underground Decision Platform
Plan → Capture → Map → Decide → Share
Button / CTA
Familjen Grotesk · 700
+0.5px tracking
12–14px size
